title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Shanks, Unknown person #5, Sanji, Unknown person #6, Lucci as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My authority level is the same as Lucci's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: So I can't override his orders...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've done plenty, Stussy! We're on our way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to stop those runts before they flatten the others!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Right!! And is it just me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Phooey! They won't stop blowing holes in the lab!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Though I suppose we can use those extra exits to get out faster!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Now that I've had a closer look...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There actually is a spark of humanity in there... but still...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 21 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
